headline: Nasdaq president says SK Hynix blockbuster IPO to draw foreign firms to US
summary: Investing.com -- Nasdaq Inc. President Nelson Griggs said the SK Hynix Inc. blockbuster listing is prompting other international companies to consider the US for initial public offerings or American depositary receipt sales.

raw.headline: Nasdaq president says SK Hynix blockbuster IPO to draw foreign firms to US
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Nasdaq Inc. President Nelson Griggs said the SK Hynix Inc. blockbuster listing is prompting other international companies to consider the US for initial public offerings or American depositary receipt sales.

headline: Delisting of Securities from The Nasdaq Stock Market
summary: NEW YORK, July 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The Nasdaq Stock Market announced today that it will delist the common stock and warrants of CERo Therapeutics Holdings, Inc. CERo Therapeutics Holdings, Inc.’s securities were suspended on October 31, 2025 and have not traded on Nasdaq since that time. Nasdaq also announced today that it will delist the ordinary shares, units, and rights of Bowen Acquisition Corp. headline: Nasdaq: Evolution To AaaS And SEC's Liquidity Risk
summary: Nasdaq's agentic AI-as-a-Service overlays legacy systems, accelerates enterprise adoption, and leverages a proprietary data moat. See why NDAQ stock is a buy.
